titleStmt.title: SII 9.423: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 423. (A.R. No. 408 of 1928.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE OUTER PRAKARA OF THE MAHALINGESVARA TEMPLE AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1322, Vikrama, Śrāvaṇa, ba. 6, Sau[myavāra], corresponding to A.D. 1400 August 11 Wednesday, in the reign of Harihara-Mahārāya ruling at Vijayanagarī. It records that, when Basavaṇṇa-Oḍeya was ruling over Bārakūrarājya under the orders of the king, Mādaṇṇaseṭṭi made a gift of land to Siṅgaṇṇa-Ayya, son of Chakravarti-Upādhyāya, a Vidvān of the maṭha of Śṛiṅgēri, for daily offerings to Nandikēśvara in front of the temple of Nakharēśvara at Basrūr and a gift of gold for the service of the god Uḷḷūradēva. The celebrated Vidyāraṇya is praised at the beginning of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmara
(ṁ) cāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . vācāḷaṁ
kurutē mūkaṁ mūkaṁ vācāḷapuṁgavaṁ . vidyāra(ṁ)ṇyagurōścitraṁ cari
traṁ caturānana(ṁ) . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśakavaruṣa 1322 saṁdu varttamā
na vikramasaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa ba6saudalu svasti śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamē
śvara śrīvīrapratāpa hariharamahārāyaru vijayanagariyali sukhadiṁ sā
mrājyavanāḷutaṁviralu Ā rāyara nirūpadiṁ basavaṁṇaOḍeyaru
bārakūra rājyavanū dhar(ṁ)mmadiṁ paripālaneya māḍutaṁvirdda kāladalu
siṁgēriya śrīmaṭhada vidyā(ṁ)nugaḷu cakravartiUpādhyāyara makkaḷu
siṁgaṁṇaAyyagaḷige bārakūra taṁmaṁṇa tolādhāriya maga basurū
ra seṭṭikāṟa mādaṁṇaseṭṭikoṭṭa śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdaḍe kaṁdā
Urada grāmada Eraḍadhivāsada Oḷage mūḍilakaṭṭina Oḷagaṇa tāu ba
ddha brahmadāyada mūlada bāḷina catuḥsīmeya vivara mūḍalu seṭṭiya be
ṭṭina siṁgaṁṇana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu . teṁkalu Uḷḷūradēvara dēvasva
da gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu . paḍuvalu mūḍilakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mū
ḍalu . baḍagalu harida sāliṁdaṁ teṁkalu . yiṁtī catuḥsīmeyiṁdoḷaguḷḷa
mane bāvi manebāgila gadde maneya hiṁdaṇa beṭṭu tippe makki mekke bayalu ka
ḷe keṟe makki mara nekki niḍilu nidhi nikṣēpa jala pāṣāṇa Ākṣīṇi Āgāmi siddha sā
dhya yiṁtī Aṣṭabhōgatējassā(ṁ)mya sahitavāgi Ā kṣētravanu Ā siṁgaṁṇaA
yyagaḷige Ā seṭṭakāṟa mādaṁṇaseṭṭi Uḍuvara baḷiya taṁna kīḷuniṁ
du bāḷuva taṁna kuṭuṁba viṭṭala modalāda Aḷiyaṁdiru sahita
vāgi sahira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi Ācaṁdrārkasthāyi
Āgi bhōgisuvareṁdu Ā halaru seṭṭikāṟaru kūḍi dhāṟeyaneradu koṭṭaru
Ā bāḷiṁge basarūra nakharēśvaradēvara muṁdaṇa naṁdikēśvaradēvara nai
vēdyakke dinaṁprati nāḍahaneyalu 1 hāne Akkiya lekkadalu varuṣaṁ
prati nāgaṁḍugadalu 9 mūḍe barave Akkiyanu Ā siṁgaṁṇaAyyagaḷu
naḍasi baharu . Uḷḷūradēvarige kaṭṭuṁdeṟāgi varuṣaṁprati 1 hoṁna na
ḍasuvaru yī bāḷiṁge Oḷage baṁdu hoṟage A(ṁ)nyaru Ārobbaru vakrisida
rādare basurūra halaru seṭṭikāṟaru pariharisi bāḷisi koḍuvaru
yiṁtappudakke sākṣigaḷu sātāuradayicaṁṇauḍuparu Aṁṇu
ḍiyanu Ānegaḷiya gōviṁdahebbāruvanu mūḍakare hebbāru
vanu yiṁtivarubheyānmatadiṁ �yo śāsanava baradu koṭṭavaru
kaṁdāurada Uḍupabheṭṭaru Ā karttāugaḷa svahastada Oppa paṁ
jattūra brahmaru sākṣigaḷa Oppa subrahmaṇyadēvaru . dānapālanayo
rmadhye dānāśreyonupālanaṁ . dānātsvargamavāpnoti pālanādacyutaṁ pa
daṁ . yī dharmmakke Aḷupidavaru vāraṇāsiyali nūṟeṁṭu kavileya
koṁda dōṣadalli hōharu maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Uḍupara baḷiya seṭṭikāra mādaṁṇaseṭṭi māḍida dharmma taṁna
jananada Upacāradoḷage nūlahabbake dēvarige ga 1 nū na
ḍasi bahanū .
Digital edition of SII 9.423 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
